item.name: Pack Hellhound Whistle
item.description: A metallic tube-like whistle that emits a unique, high-pitched tone only discernable by a hellhound raised and trained in captivity. Use to summon your pack hellhound mount.

mount.name: Pack Hellhound
mount.action: Summon forth your pack hellhound, void-spawned aberration loyal to none save you and yours.
mount.description: Having commanded armies in the hellish darkness that is the void, this demonic beast will not soon submit at the feet of another. Which is why it is all the more surprising that the hound would allow someone on her back.
mount.tooltip:
A good hound keeps
her maw shut.
- Latata
